zh.Dunham, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾鄧翰
zh.Stoke, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾斯托可--特倫特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gregory Dunham於1382年8月16日出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親Sir Robert Dunham II34歲，母親Elizabeth Margaret Sandford16歲。他和Elizabeth Marguage至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1474年11月11日在英國英格蘭越可爾享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gregory Dunham于1382年8月16日出生在英国倫敦时，他的父亲Sir Robert Dunham II34岁，母亲Elizabeth Margaret Sandford16岁。他和Elizabeth Marguage至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1474年11月11日在英国英格兰越可爾享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dunham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Dunham (Norfolk, Nottinghamshire, Cheshire). Most are named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + hām ‘homestead’. A place in Lincolnshire now known as Dunholme appears in the Domesday Book as Duneham and this too serves as a source of the surname; here the first element is probably the Old English personal name Dunna. Dunham is often difficult to tell apart from Downham .
History: John Dunham (1590–1668) was a Puritan linen weaver who came to Plymouth, MA, via Leiden, the Netherlands, in 1633. He had many prominent descendants.

variants.name: Downham
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Downham in Cambridgeshire, Essex, Norfolk, Suffolk, and Lancashire, and perhaps also from Downham, Northumberland, and Downholme, North Yorkshire, though no evidence has been found for these. The names from Lancashire and Northumberland arise from Old English dūn, dative plural dūnum ‘(at) the hills’, while the others come from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + hām ‘homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Gregory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Latin Gregorius from the post-classical Greek name Gregōrios ‘watchful’ (a derivative of gregōrein ‘to watch, be vigilant’). The name was a very popular one among the early Christians, who were mindful of the injunction ‘be sober, be vigilant’ (1 Peter 5:8). It was borne by a number of early saints. The most important, in honour of whom the name was often bestowed from medieval times onwards, were Gregory of Nazianzen ( c.329–90 ), Gregory of Nyssa ( d. c.395 ), Gregory of Tours ( 538–94 ), and Pope Gregory the Great ( c.540–604 ). A famous bearer of the name in modern times is the film star Gregory Peck ( 1916–2003 ). The name has traditionally been popular in Scotland, where it is often found in the form Gregor .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gregory Dunham was born on 16 August 1382, in London, England, his father, Sir Robert Dunham II, was 34 and his mother, Elizabeth Margaret Sandford, was 16. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Elizabeth Marguage. He died on 11 November 1474, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gregory Dunham est né le 16 août 1382, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Dunham II, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Margaret Sandford, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth Marguage. Il est décédé le 11 novembre 1474, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 92 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gregory Dunham am 16. August 1382 in London, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Dunham II 34 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Margaret Sandford 16. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Marguage mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. November 1474 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gregory Dunham è nato il il 16 agosto 1382 nel London, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Dunham II, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Margaret Sandford, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Elizabeth Marguage. Morì il 11 novembre 1474, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 92 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gregory Dunhamが1382年8月16日にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Dunham IIは34歳，母Elizabeth Margaret Sandfordは16歳であった。彼はElizabeth Marguageとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1474年11月11日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで92歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gregory Dunham(이)가 1382년 8월 16일 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Dunham II(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Margaret Sandford(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Marguage(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1474년 11월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.16 August 1382–11 November 1474: 16 de agosto de 1382–11 de novembro de 1474
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gregory Dunham nasceu em 16 de agosto de 1382, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Dunham II, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Margaret Sandford, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Elizabeth Marguage. Ele faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1474, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 92 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gregory Dunham родился 16 августа 1382 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Dunham II было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Margaret Sandford, 16. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Elizabeth Marguage. Он умер 11 ноября 1474 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 92 лет.

es.16 August 1382–11 November 1474: 16 de agosto de 1382–11 de noviembre de 1474
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gregory Dunham nació el 16 de agosto de 1382, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Dunham II, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Margaret Sandford, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Elizabeth Marguage. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1474, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 92 años.
